title: Matcha Beef Tibs
description: A twist on the traditional Ethiopian dish, with a hint of green tea from the matcha powder. This recipe combines the savory flavors of beef with the nutty taste of matcha.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the ground cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the matcha powder and stir to combine. Cook for an additional 1 minute.
Serve the beef hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Serve with injera bread or over rice.
